title: Simple PvP Pack
description: A Simple PvP pack that makes some tweaks into swords and the crosshair.
body:
Welcome to the **_Better PvP Pack_** page!
## ❔ What is this?
This is a resource pack made for a better pvp experience, and a better Vanilla one if you'd like. This changes some textures for better ones.
## ✅ Features
Replaces sword textures and the crosshair texture to small swords, and a smaller crosshair, for a better PvP experience, and a cooler texture!
## 📸 Screenshots
